original: "Why should I trust you to keep your word?" $HeOrShe is clearly unhappy with your terms. "You're no servant of Providence following the holy Word passed to us by Ludd. How can there be light in your heart?"
$HeOrShe looks upon you, face now more open than before, as if almost convinced...

"Cease, I beg you." $HeOrShe puts $hisOrHer head in $hisOrHer hands. "I pray this is the correct Path, that you are not the monster you appear."

"I must accept your terms," $heOrShe says, "I shall pray for forgiveness. And may any hellfire of this world or the next fall upon myself first and not those I seek to protect."

option_line: bffi_stationTalkRuseNice:Carry out the ruse to seize datastores and destroy the nanoforge
original: Carry out the ruse to seize datastores and destroy the nanoforge

option_line: bffi_psRuseNiceF:"I have given the Path a great gift, and that deal has held."
original: I have given the Path a great gift, and that deal has held.

"I admit, I have heard word of the one with whom this deal was struck." $HisOrHer brow furrows. "I cannot say I fully understand it, but we are... requested not to harm you, if it is so possible."

The Pather looks up and away for a moment. "This is a strange Path I find myself walking," $heOrShe says, as if to some greater power. "I pray that its truth may be revealed before long..."

"Your lucre..." A troubled look crosses $hisOrHer face, as if $hisOrHer heart isn't in this condemnation.

"You cannot simply buy your path away from perdition. Many a Mammonite has tried before, and they- they are still judged."

option_line: bffi_psRuseNiceB:"I have walked the Pilgrim's Path. We may not see eye-to-eye, but I am a fellow walker."
original: I have walked the Pilgrim's Path. We may not see eye-to-eye, but I am a fellow walker.

$HeOrShe nods, frowning. "Be that as it may, the corrupt seed of heresy lies in your heart. It is no simple matter to remove such a thing. Your path will take you through blood and pain before it can be pure."

"So it is known," $heOrShe says with a sigh. "You... confound me. Your cooperation with a goon of the Knights, a bully and torturer of a false light... I try to see some greater Plan in it, but I cannot."
